## Source: ossf-package-analysis (af5da19cc088c1f8c8715fafba484c4ae7ab890004b1f92947ee212b28b0abe1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-features-actors' @ 1.0.4 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
